CAREER & JOB OPPORTUNITIES
SEASONAL POSITIONS

WMMI does not have any seasonal/contract level positions open at this time.

INTERNSHIPS & CO-OPS

WMMI is always open to discussing potential internships or co-ops with candidates. Please feel free to contact our Executive Director at execdirector@watsonsmill.com.

MANAGEMENT LEVEL POSITIONS

WMMI does not have any management level positions open at this time.

BOARD OF DIRECTORS

Please feel free to contact us if you are interested in learning more about joining WMMI’s Board of Directors.
